-- Mission 3 Guidelines
-- Table: employees(employee_id, name, manager_id, department)
-- Self join employees e -> manager m
-- e.manager_id matches m.employee_id

SELECT
  -- TODO aliases
FROM employees e
LEFT JOIN employees m
  ON -- TODO
ORDER BY e.name;

rules: must_include:select e.name as employee_name, m.name as manager_name
